benefits.description: Appetite suppression was superior with Sema; food noise and suppression were on point, at times forgot to eat. Reta provides less suppression but still keeping meals and portion sizes to a minimum.

protocol_notes: Was on Sema for 9 months before switching to Reta, taking two weeks off between compounds. Reports Reta is a superior 3-agonist product but appetite suppression is reduced compared to Sema. Has cravings now that didn't exist on Sema. Considering adding Cagri for appetite suppression. Plans to increase Reta dose.
